subcodes.first_line: Praise, sanctified beyond utterance and understanding, befitteth and is worthy of the most sacred and transcendent Court of the Lord, the Desired One, whose mysteries [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از بیان و عرفان ساحت امنع اقدس حضرت مقصودی را لایق و سزاست که اسرار
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
